'''''Star Wars'' 20''' is the twentieth issue in the [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']] series of comics.

==Plot summary==
As part of a plot to discredit the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade]] sets up a scene where a pleasure yacht is attacked by an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] fighter only to be repelled by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]]. The scene is broadcast into the casinos on [[The Wheel/Legends|The Wheel]], where the patrons watch in horror the viciousness of the Rebels. Also part of Greyshade's scheme is to have [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] each killed while playing in separate events of [[The Big Game]] gladiator contest, but Solo confounds him by defeating his powerful opponent, much to everyone's surprise. Meanwhile, the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] have been appropriated by The Wheel, and are scheduled to have their memories wiped when [[Master-Com]] rescues them from their fate. The three droids then go to the medical center to see to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], only to find that not only has he regained consciousness but he has escaped.

==Release and reception==
This issue's letters page contains a letter from former Marvel [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']] writer [[Roy Thomas]] commenting on how the storylines that he created have been developed since he left the series.
